name: creator-chapter-helper
description: Chrome extension for importing video chapters into creator platforms.

scripts.check: node --check src/platforms/platform-registry.js && node --check src/lib/error-logger.js && node --check src/lib/douyin-automation-policy.js && node --check src/lib/extension-runtime.js && node --check src/lib/chapter-parser.js && node --check src/lib/text-policy.js && node --check src/lib/xiaohongshu-policy.js && node --check src/lib/xiaohongshu-dom-policy.js && node --check src/popup/popup.js && node --check src/content/platform-progress.js && node --check src/content/douyin.js && node --check src/content/xiaohongshu-main-world.js && node --check src/content/xiaohongshu-adapter.js && node --check src/content/index.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); if(!m.icons || !m.action.default_icon) throw new Error('missing icons'); if(!m.permissions.includes('storage')) throw new Error('missing storage permission'); if(!m.host_permissions.includes('https://creator.xiaohongshu.com/*')) throw new Error('missing xiaohongshu host permission'); if(!m.content_scripts.some((item)=>item.world==='MAIN')) throw new Error('missing main world bridge'); console.log('manifest ok')"
